| | Peter, All anyone seems to be able to talk about these days is impeachment. **Democrats were hoping for fireworks in these hearings and I’ll I’ve seen is a bunch of duds.** This sham impeachment process is crumbling apart. Every day, we hear the same thing**– President Trump did nothing wrong!** Liberals will not stop until they remove our President from office – it’s been their singular objective since he was elected! **We must protect him.** **[Chip in $25 before the end of the month to ensure we defend President Trump.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkyikz-kujulhlke-j/)**
[Stop the sham impeachment](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkyikz-kujulhlke-t/)
It’s time to get back to work and stop these wasteful hearings. President Trump and I will fight for Hoosiers and deliver on what we promised. Together, we can keep Indiana red. [**Donate to our fight today.**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkyikz-kujulhlke-i/) Thank you, Senator Mike Braun

name: Team Stephanie
subject: Grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I'm feeling grateful and ready to go after taking a few days off to relax and celebrate with friends and family.
|
---

| | Friends \-- For the last few weeks, my dining table has been our campaign HQ. It was nice to put away the laptops for a few days and sit around the dining table with family and friends. Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays. Spending time with loved ones, relaxing, and enjoying delicious food is one of the best ways to get rested and start the last month of the year with a ton of energy. **Today, we are feeling re-energized and ready to flip the 4th District of New Jersey.** [**Can you make your first contribution before midnight tonight?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff097/522d4087/7afcae22/4f341902/2594779164/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_pm_nd") My team and I are sitting down this week to talk about our budget -- how many staff we can hire and when, what will it take to open an office, and how we can invest in reaching more voters. Every donation that comes in between now and then will let us know how much we can invest in this campaign to defeat Chris Smith. I am so grateful for my friends and family -- and you. Our campaign couldn't work without you. \-- Stephanie | **[CHIP IN NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff097/522d4087/7afcae22/4f341902/2594779164/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_pm_nd")**

clean_body: Please, will you answer our pleas for help? | Peter — We emailed you last night. We emailed this morning. And now, we’re emailing one more time for help. Here’s the whole update: = We’re so thankful to the amazing grassroots supporters who have stepped up to help Democrat Kim Mangone CRUSH Trump’s yes-man, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. = = | = = = = = = McCarthy has proven that he only cares about making sure Trump gets what he wants. It’s time for him to go! But, we can only beat him and elect Democrat Kim Mangone with your help. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for ANYTHING you can give tonight. -Team Mangone | Paid for by Kim Mangone For Congress PO Box 3293, Quartz Hill, CA 93586 Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Democrat Kim Mangone is a proud United States Air Force veteran and working single mom. She is running to defeat President Trump's righthand man in the House of Representatives: Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. McCarthy spearheaded the House vote in 2017 to fully REPEAL the Affordable Care Act under Trump's direction. McCarthy is now backed by powerful special interests who will do anything to re-elect him. But Kim is ready to put the people of this district first again, by fighting for affordable health care, defending Social Security from devastating cuts, and standing up for our veterans. If you'd like to help elect Democrat Kim Mangone and finally send Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy packing, please rush a =. clean_body: $16.43 is more than just a number. It’s a symbol of what this campaign is all about. It represents a movement of everyday people chipping in whatever they can to fight for the change they dream of. | | | Friend, There are only a couple hours left until our midnight fundraising deadline. We’re blown away by how many of you donated for the first time this week to help make sure we have the funds to elect a true, working-class champion to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District. Now, we’re so close to our goal. ** - $16.43 is more than just a number. It’s a symbol of what this campaign is all about. It represents a movement of everyday people chipping in whatever they can to fight for the change they dream of. It sends a strong message that winning this race isn’t about having the biggest paychecks or fanciest fundraisers. It’s about having the biggest, boldest ideas to address the greatest problems of our generation. And it reminds us how powerful we are when we work together to fight for the progressive values and issues we care about most. But the bottom line is that we need more $16.43 donations and fast. We face bigger challenges than ever with new opponents jumping in the race and more outside money being poured in to buy influence. - ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

subject: 93% with hours to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: The end of November is just hours away, and I needed to reach out one last time to ask for your urgent help. We're 93% of the way to our fundraising goal, _**[but if you can pitch in $27 or more before midnight, that will be a huge help to close the gap.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-113019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Your support means so much to me. Thanks for all you do.

\-- Ed

name: Wendy Davis' iPhone
subject: Friends, I'm asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
---
| | I know we've been emailing you a lot, so I'll keep this short. We need to raise $3,095 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight TONIGHT.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - I know we've been emailing you a lot, so I'll keep this short. We need to raise $3,095 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight TONIGHT. And because I'm refusing all money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, I'm truly relying on grassroots donors like you to help us meet this crucial benchmark in our campaign. There's only a few hours left -- will you rush in a donation using this secure link? _[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_noveom?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_noveom?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatedavmonthlynov&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1")_ My Republican opponent has his GOP Super PACs and corporate mega-donors -- but I've got YOU in my corner. And you're all we need to win this. Much love, Wendy _Sent from my iPhone_

Today is our final day to hit our November fundraising goal, and we're _so close_ to reaching it.

**From where we're at right now, we need 67 people from Pennsylvania to make a donation today to hit it by midnight.**

We need your support now more than ever. Your donation today -- $2, $5, or anything you can -- could be the difference between finishing this month strong, or falling short.

>
Because of grassroots donors, we've built a campaign that's focused on bold ideas that will inspire people and get them out to caucus and get them out to vote.

And now that we're nearing the Iowa Caucuses and early voting in states across the country, it's absolutely crucial that we continue to spread our message of big, structural change.

**Hitting this critical November fundraising goal will mean that we have a strong budget to knock on doors, buy ads, make calls, host events, and get more and more people into this fight.**

[**We can't afford to leave anything on the table right now. This entire team would be so grateful if you could be one of the 67 from Pennsylvania to chip in today and hit our November fundraising goal.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b699/45c30650/11e33137d/66f9259f/3993789203/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItYmlsLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDJQRl9FT01fR09MX0NfMjAxOTExMzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-bil-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML2PF_EOM_GOL_C_20191130_V1S1_P")

Team Warren

"" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Because of grassroots donors, we've built a campaign that's focused on bold ideas that will inspire people and get them out to caucus and get them out to vote. And now that we're nearing the Iowa Caucuses and early voting in states across the country, it's absolutely crucial that we continue to spread our message of big, structural change. Hitting this critical November fundraising goal will mean that we have a strong budget to knock on doors, buy ads, make calls, host events, and get more and more people into this fight. "" As always, thank you, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

But first, please let me explain why it's so important:](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d275e/2319309905/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+about+to+ask+you+for+270+before+&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all") Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, my family never had it easy. The odds were stacked against us from the start. My grandmother immigrated to this country as an orphan when she was 7. She never made it past the fourth grade but worked hard and cleaned houses to provide for us. **She never could have imagined her grandson would one day run for President -- but that 's the American Dream for you. ** More than anything, I want to reach the next debate stage for my grandmother -- and for every struggling American who doesn't think they have anyone speaking for them. [Before midnight, will you chip in $2.70 to help me qualify for the next debates? ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d275d/2319309905/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Before+midnight+will+you+chip+in+270+to+&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d275c/2319309905/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191130_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+amount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d2744/2319309905/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d2743/2319309905/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ef/3eb3e2fc/68032752/744d2742/2319309905/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
What more can I say? Since we got started just three months ago, the response to this campaign has been truly remarkable. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d182/2427043547/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Thank you, thank you, thank you.

What more can I say? Since we got started just three months ago, the response to this campaign has been truly remarkable.

I knew from day one that this wasn't going to be easy--that we were going to be attacked on many fronts--and I haven't for one second underestimated the amount of work it's going to take to actually pull this off next November.

But you and I share a real passion for the work at hand, and knowing that I have this incredible team by my side lifts me up every single day.

We have a long way to go, but I want to make sure I'm taking every opportunity I have to tell you how grateful I am for everything you do.

Every dollar that you give brings us that much closer to achieving our goals. We're in this together. [**_If you can chip in once more before our midnight fundraising deadline, it 'd mean the world._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191130_JH_20191130-fr-JH-thanks-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Team, thank you.

Until next time,
John
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d180/2427043547/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d181/2427043547/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d1be/2427043547/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d1bf/2427043547/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d1bc/2427043547/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d1bd/2427043547/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d1ba/2427043547/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771422/691c9bd/6fa99ae7/11a7d180/2427043547/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Xan
subject: bumping this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| Our end-of-month deadline is just a few hours away, so I wanted to make one final appeal.

**[Will you make a quick donation to support our campaign?](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+make+a+quick+donation+to+suppor&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd")**

John laid out earlier exactly what we're fighting for. If you haven't had a chance to read it, please take a minute to do so and then share it with a friend or two.

Thanks so much!
Xan
* * *
**From:** John Delaney
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Saturday, November 30, 2019
**Re:** people are scared [](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901be/30fd46cd/32d16f7a/2354ebb7/3027891766/VEsE/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd") Friends, I know we keep asking for donations, and I'm truly sorry about that.

But here's why we have to keep doing it:

**If you haven 't heard, the Democratic National Committee set a donor threshold in order to participate in the Presidential Debates.**

That means our campaign must reach a certain number of donors in order to share our vision with the American voters.

We're quickly growing our donor network, but right now, we still need your help.

**[Will you make a donation of $5 or more right now to help us keep our message front and center?](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+make+a+donation+of+5+or+more+ri&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd")** | | | **[Donate $5»](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=4+-+Donate+5+raquo&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd")**

****
Over the last few weeks, I've been traveling the country -- from California to Iowa to New Hampshire. And the thing I keep hearing again and again is that so many Democratic voters are scared right now.

**They 're scared we're going to lose the biggest election of our lifetimes because we chose to elevate a platform that is impossible to implement.**

Voters will ultimately see through policy proposals like Medicare for All or the Green New Deal because of the havoc they'll wreak on our economy and health care system, and because getting universal health care and fighting climate change are too important. We can't afford to get it wrong.

That's why we urgently need a voice of pragmatism to cut through the noise and partisan talking points. And if we're going to be that voice, I'm going to need your help.

**Will you chip in a few dollars today to stand with our campaign?**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=10+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.30_e2_xf_eom_nd")**

I'm so grateful for everything you do,
John

body:
| |
---
| Team - I have a quick favor to ask: [Will you donate to my campaign before our end-of-month deadline at midnight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9a8/134673f2/9e8f8e1/6997b9e1/2815417428/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As my team explained, hitting this goal will be crucial for showing undecided voters across the country, but especially in early voting states, that this campaign is in it to win it.

This movement has and will always be powered by supporters like you, friend, and I'm grateful to have you in my corner.

You can use this link to donate now:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9a8/134673f2/9e8f8e1/6997b9e1/2815417428/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you for everything you do,

Michael Bennet

body:
without your immediate support, I’m going to miss my November fundraising goalWithout your immediate support, I'm likely going to miss my November fundraising goal. I can't let that happen. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_t=NUifKl7bK-TPgxXdRcW1tMOVTc6HPCoehS5yDAkxDDYEUDx4EOtJQZh4kzOwCXewXitaHrmPJ_Z8xZagAFbD9Tg3uPmByvcDLM4Zo9cn-eUiISahNlcynGWgesDJMvDVPJOGZp_GHiC2cnqx4SH-euJJBdvHYlrLQpLyY0iWntg%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0oT5hwfhlgDxWN_Wf_30wD5gidJLh8oCqMt_qwAvW7St6JNGxQ3wGl72VJc8ij0jbqiNsRfc57JY8PFb00vN4aYKpnyF3MVQqlZmAMrkFO7B45isYgAfYopTthAsgcCrcYCkMFu45NY8hts5xzL9_dwj5o04Sc5geKHoiecz3gMTQj5WHUSWRGmVhFs8xIJBEerAHmOjlwSOx59N0iTxGqJ9xk6KBGh7RulIQAFR0SUd)
---
**I need to raise $2,700 BY MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**.

Friend,

First off, I want to thank you for being a part of **_our_** team.

Next, I want to acknowledge that I’m well aware I send you a couple of donation solicitations each week, however, _**[there is so much at stake in 2020 that we have to be just as relentless as the bias news media](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0oT5hwfhlgDxWN_Wf_30wD6uxU6FqHjNq3OdBT4bYaW-mq8Xp6KNIOOWuYGRS7oi5-m6NB-0GKE7iKBin2XAdUfh_Edaij3lnoA44z7SyU1nCtt0s4wY1yp1inRrEuJJDKzsJKbd0W1D4MPbHyKJy_AOBFe40nCdLa0cKiH5q3JGqxHkEksfssV8kGeSenyfuHJareq_1m8M5SGXUqDPu-zcRdX3PNVqRFdrEKKIIlVi)**_.

As a conservative woman of color, I have a unique perspective to add to the conversation – **[but I won’t have the chance to help grow the Republican Party if _I am_ not able to mount a competitive challenge in the nine-person primary _I am_ in](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0oT5hwfhlgDxWN_Wf_30wD7NNQ3MD4MLYWo38dYtu9hmRERcEKDjoDOtmtTV-BLSS8tVKBIFKfiwzz4Ics-5J3RTEY-jjDhWgFbuA1e-KNUGUU4zY9nZDp8JhGXzIWtoRGqjBvQQvkJv_wfXPMN6bNIKrghBgl2Bj92rL26n_fQV26Em1xzpEvSae35alO8m9qcZKLVshBMc19HqQZS6YI0lz4OGsWH4fkuguUZLAgfZ)**.
| [**Help Me Reach
My November Goal»**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0ptC8bKbvXEmbVSgUStyNAChosFy7oTVI5K6ECQGun1ZJEp1OyZEucvByrmwr2QdaaxKVjcFInQCFqClc_NMEXlTpEfH8nMYh_d9LEmrE7B2hOzqkRelzYpnYK_-fBtgPE5bOMilso5b-qayYA1zWwq4_3MqSZ11ADEzkCTWD4bQs8oJ9DKJVDJFppCeIlTrWcdd62lxu5TXKKH5-3ZYk_QdTrsDfg5W_LGPsbrZl4yY)
---

**TONIGHT** , at midnight is the penultimate fundraising deadline of the YEAR, and **[I am at risk of missing my November fundraising goal if I’m not able to find an additional $2,700 in the next twelve hours.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0oT5hwfhlgDxWN_Wf_30wD74eQahHuMut4E8Hcp1mgetHi08oylNFuykSmIDYNk3oS1dkAYk1odM740GodTsfErEmzzTf5D4lTXC04YXH0yA-snIOhMthEx4Glo2SDAURsKKmmNH3THDfrk48pdx2PKzksmORJj7HZyc-vt-kyvxVHTw0Vmr_rAAOm36r31fVghqpVIkk6373v3Z4FXATqIRy1qyFu51-rcO1D6lgvE7)**

**Are you able to chip in $25, $250, $500, $50 or even $1,000 or more to help me close the gap and close out November with a win?**

I’m running to be a congressional ally of **_our conservative values_** _and of President Trump_! _He needs re-enforcements!_ When I get there, I will:
* Take on AOC and "The Squad"
* Fight for prison reform
* end illegal immigration
* Continue to cut taxes and roll back regulations
* PUT AMERICA FIRST

[Chip-in $50](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=3407136925bb4c41b34f723d2cd695cb&_e=QoX0oPweFT-pzqbgywZtrkcH01AyaxeM6N-IN1sg6wiU-5B1o6WA70rUXn-zFuwfaooEbw5r8jHLlnauo0Xo0hLQOepuwJhP4Bd_YLpXESByHPtn9N74n8-C2kjT-9OwLyaT9iz0YVaX1wTEV4bstx-wLEoO71KuMHQ3alD2BFwiUJPFkyNdwF8R8yk4ypmcNe3ioUXOioqCB-BHQnuUg5XGQylqvfxDTuHSsk2qhMNySeQ6LOvqFgPSqahFSh8KxOTY4xaInjiZkdU7QoxdCO18BXuWU1hSgv9d4o88D1rdDlP3nGnxvISAThte8fPE)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: different kind of month
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdktillt-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

This definitely is not the first time I've emailed you about my end-of-month fund.

It happens roughly every 30 days, a regular, ordinary occurrence.

But do you know what has happened over the past month that could not be any farther from ordinary?

The month of November has been filled with shameful behavior from Democrats, trying desperately to turn their fantasyland of reversing the 2016 election into reality... all without a shred of evidence or any semblance of facts.

That's why when I say that I need your help to make our end-of-month fundraising goal, it is no ordinary ask. There is much more at stake this month... and everything we raise will go directly to combat the Democrats’ impeachment narrative.

Can I count on you to chip in anything you can? [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/eom-november/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_eom_20191130_noveom_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

END OF MONTH FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/eom-november/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_eom_20191130_noveom_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1] CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/eom-november/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_eom_20191130_noveom_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and they let me know that we are currently $4,521 away from our end-of-month goal.

By hitting our goal, we can make a real difference from right here in Ohio.

We can dispel the false narratives being pushed by the left about President Trump, and we can make sure we are in a position to fight for common sense conservative results.

If you are serious about defending due process and believe Washington should put results for hardworking families before impeachment, I need you to chip in right now. https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/eom-november [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/eom-november/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_eom_20191130_noveom_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jdktillt-kujkulhluu-f/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jdktillt-kujkulhluu-z/ Forward https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jdktillt-l-v Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jdktillt-961825B2-kujkulhluu-e | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jdktillt-kujkulhluu-s/

| | I know it's late, team, but Jordan texted me about the goal that I set to keep our digital ad running.

We're just $97 away from reaching it, and that's great news. What's not great is that we only have a few more hours to hit it, but I know we will.

If you can, here's a link to help us out: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2428/33365068/4a625aba/3f8b8c8a/3310827212/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191130_em_fr_cell_b2_all&amount=15")

Thank you,

Mike

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We’re at a major crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
And we can’t back down

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3870%2E377263%2EqbbTlc) Yang Gang --

I didn’t start this campaign because I ever dreamed of being president. I started this campaign because I’m a husband, a father, and a patriot. I started this campaign because I saw a lack of humanity in America’s laws and policies that affect us every single day.

I’m not running for president because I’m a hero -- I’m running for president because I’m human.

And that’s why I promised to lead with Humanity First values -- and I have every intention of keeping that promise. But without your help, I may not get the chance.

Our campaign is at a crossroads. If we meet our $2 million goal by midnight tonight, we can move forward, more motivated than ever to make sure our government puts Humanity First. If not, we will fall short when it matters most.

[Yang Gang, I want to keep fighting for you. Can you fight for me right now by donating $10 or more?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18490?t=8&akid=3870%2E377263%2EqbbTlc) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18490?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3870%2E377263%2EqbbTlc)

name: Cory Booker
subject: you there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Just wanted you to know that we are incredibly close to our $1,500,000 goal. We still need a few more people to step up.
Friend,
Before I turn in for the night, I thought you should know that **we're incredibly close to reaching our $1,500,000 goal.**
You may have heard me say this before -- but as your president, I'm going to ask more of you than any president has ever asked in our lifetime. The challenges we face are not going to be met by one person. It's going to take all of us coming together.
At this moment, I'm asking you to step up and support this movement to unite our country and heal America after years of Trump's hatred and division.
**If you 're with me, chip in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We've already launched a persuasion program using the money we've raised since last week's debate. Thanks to supporters like you, we're reaching more voters and caucus-goers -- increasing our chances of making the December debate -- and as a result, improving our odds of winning the nomination.
Now, we have to get past this big fundraising goal at midnight tonight. We're so close, but we still need a few more people to step up.
**So, please if you can, donate before midnight. Once again, here 's a link to chip in: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I know I can count on you.
Cory
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33e/3102112032/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33d/3102112032/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33c/3102112032/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33b/3102112032/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33a/3102112032/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbe/5fca0d19/78b5484c/291ca33e/3102112032/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Everything he's fought for -- we've fought for -- is on the line tonight. Julian needs 6500 of his strongest supporters to step up with $5 to meet his goal. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+The+choice+we+make+in+these+next+3+hours&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Reaching tonight's goal is about so much more than helping Julian qualify for the next debate. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f0/3eb3e2fc/68091201/744d2643/4219848512/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f0/3eb3e2fc/68091201/744d2642/4219848512/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f0/3eb3e2fc/68091201/744d2641/4219848512/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Tonight's deadline is the biggest we've ever faced. \-- We can either let Julian down, fail to meet our End of Month goal, and jeopardize our shot to see him in the next debate. \-- Or we can band together, blow tonight 's deadline out of the water, and fund the staff and programs Julian critically needs to qualify for that stage. "" Reaching tonight's goal is about so much more than helping Julian qualify for the next debate. It's about kids of every race, creed, and religion watching the debates, searching for someone on that stage who looks like them. It's about every struggling family listening, waiting to hear from a candidate who knows what it means to work for everything they've got. It's about everyone who's been left out of the conversation, finally hearing a voice on that stage fighting for them. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Team Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: President Trump is counting on us
body:
We have just a few hours left to raise $5,826 and meet our campaign’s goal.

Peter,

I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump in our race for U.S. Senate. He’s counting on us to build a grassroots campaign that will fight and win with him next year.

But we need conservative leaders like you to do it. Our end-of-month fundraising ends at MIDNIGHT, can you chip-in before the deadline? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-november?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Nov%202]

name: Governor-Elect Andy Beshear
subject: An update from Kentucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | | Team, I wanted to send you a quick note on last month's victory in Kentucky.

Our campaign was never about me - it was about respecting the voices of all Kentuckians and bringing dignity and respect for everyone back to the governor's office.

We're so proud of the race we ran. We focused on the issues that matter most to our working families: public education, health care and good paying jobs. And it was great to see everyday Kentuckians like teachers, social workers and first responders come together and demand an administration that truly fights for them. This was a huge win for them and for our whole state.

**And the good news didn 't stop there. **

Just a few weeks later Louisiana re-elected Democratic Governor John Bel Edwards. **Our victories made one thing absolutely clear: Democrats can win everywhere.**

I can't thank you enough, Team DGA, for standing with me and helping elect Democratic governors across the nation.

Thanks again, for everything.

Andy Beshear
Kentucky Governor-Elect
---
| | | | [DONATE](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY2NTI2NTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDA0NzczMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
P.S. Did you miss out on the chance to help us win in November?

**Good news:** It's not too late to help elect Democratic governors! Victory in Kentucky and Louisiana was just the first step in proving that Democrats can win everywhere. This month, the DGA will face one of their biggest and most critical monthly goals yet - and with an average gift of just $19.67, every dollar makes a huge difference. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Voters turning on Lindsey Graham for this betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham has spent the last weeks contorting his previous stances in every way possible to defend Trump against the impeachment proceedings. But this time, he's gone too far, even for him. Last week, Graham torched a longtime friendship along with what was left of his credibility when he announced he'd launch his own Senate investigation into Joe Biden's interactions with Ukraine \-- long debunked smears designed to muddy the waters of Trump's impeachment. Even as recently as September, Graham said he wouldn't attack Biden. This year, he's gone on television to call Biden "honorable" and "a good man." The facts of Biden's interactions with Ukraine in 2016 haven't changed \-- only Graham's fealty to Trump has. We need to work to get Lindsey and all of his fellow Trump-enabling senators out of office. Lindsey Graham's re-election campaign is flush with cash from large-money donors and corporate PACs, but Jaime Harrison, Graham's Democratic opponent, is making major headway with two back-to-back record-breaking fundraising quarters. We're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham and his re-election race, and we need 119 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you support Lindsey Graham?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9b/6e9863e8/16c91177/1db0a354/87920900/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Cma4UsY-x") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9b/6e9863e8/16c91177/1db0a354/87920900/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Cma4UsY-x") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9b/6e9863e8/16c91177/1db0a35b/87920900/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191201a.ND-b&refcode2=ACjUhKn6V5mFacZhpqv2")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Have you ever been to Vonda's?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Small businesses are the backbone of our economy. So in honor of Small Business Saturday (which was just yesterday), I'd like to highlight one of the many small businesses right here in Newark. I want to tell you about Vonda's Kitchen. Vonda McPherson was working a corporate career when in the late 90s, she decided to pursue her dream of opening a restaurant. Her passion for culinary arts eventually led her to open Vonda's Kitchen in the heart of Newark. Vonda's may be known for soul food, but it has some delicious vegan options too. So, as you can imagine, I'm a frequent visitor -- as are many of my fellow Newarkers. Her restaurant has become a beloved neighborhood staple, employing local residents and serving amazing food. Small businesses like hers strengthen our communities and create millions of jobs across America. I recently released a plan that would empower small businesses and help them get the resources they need to succeed. **[Add your name if you agree that we should support our small businesses.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/small-businesses-signon?source=em_pet_20191201_CB_20191201-pet-CB-smallbiz-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** My plan calls for expanding access to capital in underserved communities, empowering more entrepreneurs of color through Baby Bonds, and cracking down on practices that undermine the ability of small businesses to compete on a level playing field. We have to create more prosperity in every part of our country -- from inner cities to rural areas. A major way we can achieve that is through promoting small business growth and development. **[Sign your name here if you share my belief that we should help our entrepreneurs achieve the American dream.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/small-businesses-signon?source=em_pet_20191201_CB_20191201-pet-CB-smallbiz-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I hope you'll find some time to support a small business near you this weekend. Cory _P.S. Vonda's has some of the best brussels sprouts around._ __
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca376/1829969303/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca375/1829969303/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca374/1829969303/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca373/1829969303/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca372/1829969303/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db9/5fca0d19/78b834d9/291ca376/1829969303/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I know we're still celebrating a great week for Virginia Democrats, but we have some troubling news from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec59/1752660049/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek, I know we're still celebrating a great week for Virginia Democrats, but we have some _troubling news_ from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.

FiveThirtyEight ran an article analyzing 2020 Senate races and they rated Virginia's partisan lean as only _**D+0.1!**_

**Remember, Mark only won his last race in 2014 by _less than 1%,_ so there's no doubt about it: this WILL be a tough race.

Even though we had a good week, we can't take anything for granted. We have to start preparing now if we're going to carry this momentum into 2020. Can you chip in -- any amount -- today to help send Mark back to the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec58/1752660049/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec47/1752660049/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec46/1752660049/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec45/1752660049/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec44/1752660049/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec43/1752660049/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Since Virginia will be a battleground state in next year's presidential election, the Trump campaign has already begun pouring money into our Commonwealth in an effort to turn it red -- **_and defeat Mark._**

The Trump campaign even located its headquarters in Northern Virginia! That's how much they're investing in simultaneously flipping Virginia and Mark's seat.

Six years ago, when Mark last ran for re-election, polls consistently had him leading Ed Gillespie by double digits. Political experts even rated his race as a **_Likely D_** win.

But when the dust settled, Mark won by **_0.8%, or 17,727 votes._** Virginia is always competitive and 2020 won't be an exception.

**We need to raise enough money before 2019 ends so we can head into 2020 fired up and ready to expand our team, run ads, and knock doors.[How much we're able to raise depends on you. Can you pitch in today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec42/1752660049/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec41/1752660049/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191201nd__362__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d761/53d9897e/53f164ff/1c89ec40/1752660049/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Together, we're sending a message to the rich and powerful who run the show in Washington: the time for quick fixes and nibbling around the edges is over. We need big, structural change, and... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b6c7/45c30650/11ffd978f/66f92a9a/3743534715/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I wanted to thank you for being such an important part of this team.

Together, we're sending a message to the rich and powerful who run the show in Washington: the time for quick fixes and nibbling around the edges is over. **We need big, structural change, and we're building a movement of working people who are ready to fight for it.**

That's how we'll win. And we're just getting started.

I believe in how we're doing this, and I believe in our power together.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| **Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Chip in now to help build our movement.**

body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Tomorrow is Thanksgiving holiday across our beautiful state and country.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
[_**This just in**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=46&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0). We are extending our deadline for one more day! We came up just a little bit short of our original goal we set at the beginning of November. [_**Will you help us before midnight?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Donate $100 to Mike Turner before tonight at midnight!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=35&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $75 to Mike Turner before tonight at midnight!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=37&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $45 to Mike Turner before tonight at midnight!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate Any Amount to Mike Turner before tonight at midnight!>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
[_**Can we count on you?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) All we need is the support of **50 generous patriots** just like you, each giving $20 for us to reach our goal of eclipsing $1,000 by midnight tonight.
Mike Turner working for you each day to protect good paying jobs remaining here in the Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio.
Mike needs your help. His opponent is a Washington lobbyist who would ally with Pelosi and Schiff if elected. [_**To defeat her in 2020, Mike is going to need the help of patriots just like you to prevent the attacks of the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on her behalf**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Please consider donating before the extended deadline of tonight at midnight. [_**Every dollar you give will go to keeping Ohio Red in 2020!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Team Turner
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Turner
Date: Fri, Nov. 30, 2019 12:45 PM
Subject: We need you to donate!

**[_Important: please read!_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---
Peter,
[_**If you are reading this, we have important news for you!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=42&ms=NDEyMzQ3NTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDA2MzQ4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) At 11:59 PM tonight, we will hit a critical end of month fundraising deadline for Mike Turner's reelection campaign. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Thank you for this opportunity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,

I want to thank you for the honor of running for President of the United States of America. It has been an endeavor filled with immeasurable wisdom, passions, humor and insights to, and from, the people of America. I have “lived America” ... and will cherish every moment, whether a veteran from a maximum security penitentiary calling to say, “Hey, Joe, the guys have heard you’re running for President, and they want you to know they’re going to organize Philadelphia for you,” or the tears of a transgender youth as she quietly told me she just wants what everybody else wants. I could never pay enough for what I experienced, and the men and women I met.

It’s a marvelous fabric we Americans have woven together throughout the centuries. I know there is a tear in that fabric right now; but it can be repaired by someone who can lead, and therefore unite, all Americans. It’s been done before, beginning with the best, George Washington, as he lay on the ground after battle to sleep in a cloak together with his men even before he was a President who united America.

A moral compass for our great ship of state is the beacon most needed today. And it is for the Captain of State who offers it that all Americans will provide the fair winds and following seas to advance us. That is necessary for us both at home and abroad, to convene the world to advance our policies and commitment to democratic values for our collective good.

Again, thank you for this priceless opportunity as I end our campaign together. Without the privilege of national press, it is unfair to ask others to husband their resolve and to sacrifice resources any longer. I deeply appreciate the support so many of you offered -- whether by volunteering, offering financial contributions or coming to our campaign events. I will miss the opportunities I had in experiencing America in such a wonderful way!

With my deepest appreciation, please accept my final note of service to you ... Joe Sestak

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.

Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/45f7de0c-8014-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/d241096d-8714-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjQxMDk2ZC04NzE0LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5te1whAdlwmDTOBC_IPqHmkDHxHxwzHL1lfQ0EICFkY=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com

name: MJ Hegar
subject: two reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489096d/7f51f7bc/4ba593dd/4ef089b9/54687740/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

I hope your Thanksgiving was joyful and stress-free. I've spent the last few days enjoying some downtime with my family, and I'm starting off December reminded of the top two reasons I decided to run for Senate. There's one hanging onto the front of me and the other hiding behind me in this photo: | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489096d/7f51f7bc/4ba593dd/4ef089b8/54687740/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191201.1nd__580__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
I got into this because, like so many other folks across Texas and beyond, I can't accept the mess we're leaving for our kids. I'm not a politician, so running for Senate wasn't some next step in a master plan for me.

But I care a whole lot about taking on climate change and conserving our environment so that our kids have a clean, thriving planet to live on. I care about protecting and improving health care so they can live long and healthy lives, and passing gun reforms so they're safe going to school, or a concert, or the movies. My opponent, Sen. Cornyn, hasn't given us any reason to believe he cares about those things.

**[If you're with me, I hope you'll pitch in to this campaign so we can work together to create a better future for the next generation.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489096d/7f51f7bc/4ba593dd/4ef089b8/54687740/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191201.1nd__580__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We have less than one year left to build the campaign we need to win, and I know we can do it if we work together.

Thanks,
MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489096d/7f51f7bc/4ba593dd/4ef089b8/54687740/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191201.1nd__580__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump "religious freedom" hypocrisy is on full display
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, This fall, Trump went before the U.N. to announce new initiatives promoting "religious freedom" and countering religious persecution. And now he's trying to claim support for religious freedom by tying foreign aid to a country's record of treating religious minorities fairly. This coming from the same president who immediately enacted a Muslim Ban as soon as he came into office rings of hypocrisy. This coming from the same president who wants to allow companies to fire workers if they don't practice the same religion rings of hypocrisy. This coming from the same president who wants to allow discrimination against LGBTQ+ people because of "religious beliefs" rings of hypocrisy. Of course, he could just be doing all this to ensure his white evangelical base turns out in 2020. We're wondering what American voters think: **Is Trump a hypocrite on "religious freedom"?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9c/6e9863e8/16cb608d/1db0a35c/3133251717/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/oN7uWfYd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9c/6e9863e8/16cb608d/1db0a35c/3133251717/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/oN7uWfYd") Thanks for answering our survey, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9c/6e9863e8/16cb608d/1db0a3a3/3133251717/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191201b.ND&refcode2=tPXObEbS4p7SZCdrl7Y2")

name: Jason Yates
subject: Donate while you shop!
body:
| Shop with Amazon Smile and donate to My Faith Votes | Peter, Tomorrow is Cyber Monday, the largest online shopping day of the year. With just over three weeks until Christmas, people are pulling out their lists and getting ready to shop for Christmas. **There is a unique opportunity for you to do your online shopping AND give to My Faith Votes at the same time!** Amazon has a super cool program called Amazon Smile. For every purchase you make on smile.amazon.com, the AmazonSmile Foundation will donate 0.5% to the charity of your choice! That’s right. Instead of the big company choosing what charities they give to – you get to choose! You can designate My Faith Votes as your charity of choice, and with each of your Amazon purchases this Cyber Monday, you will be helping us reach Christians to vote in the 2020 elections! **I encourage you to take just a minute and connect your Amazon account to My Faith Votes.** Together, we will continue to awaken more Christians to the power of Biblical principles and their votes! **Here are the quick steps to ensure your Amazon purchases are going to a worthwhile cause.** 1\. Go to [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191201com01&n=1) 2\. Type in “**My Faith Votes** ” as the organization of your choice Just note, in order for the charity to receive the contribution from Amazon you must make any Amazon purchase from [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191201com01&n=2). Amazon.com and Smile.Amazon.com are the same company **_with the same prices_**. **If you _already_ have an Amazon Smile Account and want to change your charity to My Faith Votes:**
1. Go to [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191201com01&n=3)
2. Click on “** _Your Account_** ” from the drop-down menu select “Your Amazon Smile”
3. Click the “** _Change Your Charity_** ” button on the right side of your page
4. Type in “**My Faith Votes** ” as the organization of your choice
5. Use the “**Select** ” button to choose My Faith Votes

Thanks so much for taking the time to see your Amazon purchases make a difference in our country and in the upcoming elections! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191201com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191201com01&n=5).

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: Sunday Update: your chance to win, our gratitude, and fun ways to get involved!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey, there: I’m Julia, and I’m a user engagement specialist for Tom 2020 (what that means is that I read all the replies to emails like this, messages we get on social media platforms, and other outreach from folks like you!). I support Tom because he is the only candidate that treats climate change as the serious crisis it actually is. And this week, I'm happy to share the weekly campaign update with you! 🗓Happy December! November was a fantastic month for this team. Tom did a great job at the Democratic debate, we met the polling requirement to participate in the next DNC debate, and our volunteers and organizers shared Tom’s message with hundreds of thousands of voters. **Thank you for being a part of this important work.** 🌇Join Tom in Los Angeles for the December Democratic debate! You and a friend could be the lucky winners of a free trip to L.A. to meet up with Tom and attend the debate in person. [_**Enter now for a chance to win! Enter by making a contribution to Tom Steyer 2020 or during the Promotion Period, by recruiting first-time donors to contribute from during the Promotion Period, or enter without contributing or recruiting new contributors by following instructions . Recruiting a first-time donor enters both the recruiter and the first-time donor in the Contest. Winners will receive the following prizes (the “Prizes”): (1) one trip for two people to attend the Democratic National Committee-sponsored presidential debate in Los Angeles on December 19, 2019, including transportation, lodging, meals, and attendance at such debate (approximately $2,000 in value), (2) one trip for two people, including transportation, lodging, and meals, to meet Tom Steyer on the campaign trail, based on the schedules of the winner and Tom Steyer 2020 (approximately $2,000 in value) and (3) 50 tartan style neckties for 50 different winners (approximately $25 in value each). Odds of winning depend on eligible entries received. 52 prizes will be awarded out of approximately 10,000,000 notices distributed. All Prizes will be awarded. The winners will be determined by a random drawing from all eligible entries to be held at Tom Steyer 2020 on December 12, 2019. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent US residents 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law). SWEEPSTAKES SUBJECT TO OFFICIAL RULES and additional restrictions on eligibility, available . Sponsor: Tom Steyer 2020, P.O. Box 626, San Francisco, CA 94104. Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA

name: Andrew Yang
subject: What you’re doing makes a huge difference in how we campaign. Thank you for everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Here’s what we’re building together:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ) Yang Gang -- we did it!

We raised $2 million in a week.

That’s incredible. I remember when the team talked to me about this goal, I thought it was ambitious and aggressive. But I also knew that if anyone could do it, it would be you, Yang Gang!

**Not only did we hit the goal, but we hit another milestone. Yesterday was the single biggest fundraising day in the history of the campaign. We are showing everyone that a grassroots campaign funded by the people can take on the establishment.**

There’s no stopping you, no stopping us -- and there’s no stopping this campaign. We are continuing to rise in the polls and grow everywhere.

So thank you, Yang Gang -- none of this would be possible without you. You truly are a force to be reckoned with.

Your contribution and the fundraising allows us to run a different type of campaign -- a campaign that’s playing to win. We’re up on the air in Iowa and New Hampshire right now, and we’ll be up even longer because of you!

**[As a thank you, I wanted to share our new ad. Your contributions are what allow us to share this message with voters in early states. You can watch it here:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18553?t=5&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ)** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18553?t=8&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ) | [Watch](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18553?t=7&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ)
---
December is the most important month yet for our campaign. We will need to have our biggest month of growth if we’re going to qualify for the debates and run the campaign we need to win. But I know with this team, everything is possible.

Let’s make history in 2020!

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18553?t=6&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3934%2E377263%2E11fWCZ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: POLLING UPDATE: Trump in trouble with key demographic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, _Reuters_ recently released a poll that highlights a growing problem for Trump's re-election campaign: he is very unpopular with independents. 62% of independents surveyed disapproved of him, higher than the national opinion average, and 64% of independents also believe the country is currently on the wrong track. Independent voters may be the key to unseating Donald Trump and retaking the White House, but with the news cycle and public opinion changing so quickly, we need to keep our data from all engaged voters as up-to-date as possible. Can you update your response now? **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9d/6e9863e8/16c4b04b/1db0a3a4/1139365520/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/fkGtxFIW") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9d/6e9863e8/16c4b04b/1db0a3a4/1139365520/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/fkGtxFIW") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9d/6e9863e8/16c4b04b/1db0a3ab/1139365520/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191201c.ND&refcode2=ewKvViiaNZ7xUyeRxfX6")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?
