name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🦃 Thankful for the Blessings of our Farmers
body:
I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday with your friends and family.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XNhHL7yFfv0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489

Thousands of jobs in Iowa are tied to agriculture. It's the backbone of our economy. But Congress isn't doing its job to protect Iowa farmers and producers with good policies. Take a look at my proposals here (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XNhHL7yFfv0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) .

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
Hello

I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XUckXzA8Vu0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) with your friends and family. I took time off the trail this week to eat some great home cooking and spend time with my family (and also to watch Iowa dominate Nebraska (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QZQYZynu5lA&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) ).

On Thursday, many of us probably gave thanks for the blessing of our food-makers, but the thankless and disciplined work of our farmers needs to be top of mind everyday. As Iowans, we see firsthand the benefits our farmers make to our suppers and also our local economies. In Congress, I will oppose burdensome government mandates placed on the backs of our farmers (like WOTUS) and work to expand the reach of our agricultural products to more markets in order to truly realize the economic benefits our farmers produce.

When elected to Congress, I am committed to
* Expanding trade opportunities and increasing global competitiveness
* Utilizing exports to promote economic growth
* Combating over-regulation that leads to higher production costs and food prices
* Maintaining an adequate farming subsidy system and ensuring that federal programs are beneficial while also cost-effective
* Supporting research to supplement innovations in agriculture

I can't fight for the needs of our farmers and agricultural laborers without your support. Please considering donating $5, $15 or even $25 (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489)

You can also support our conservative voice that's desperately needed in Washington attending our ONE-NIGHT-ONLY concert with country singer Trey Taylor. Trey opened rallies for President Trump during his 2016 campaign. I'm grateful for the support and confidence that Trey has placed in our movement and can't wait to hear all the stories he has from the campaign trail. Read on to find out more about his special performance!
$25 GENERAL ADMISSION TICKETS HERE (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489)
Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you!

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
MORE ON AGRICULTURE
PROMOTING OUR MESSAGE

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5YHL5um2Sv0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
Check out our latest video highlighting how Iowa neighbors solve problems better than career politicians!

UPCOMING EVENTS

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DPMA5LIcoSQ&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
Country star Trey Taylor is hosting an EXCLUSIVE evening of entertainment for our supporters in Sioux City on December 13th.

$25 GENERAL ADMISSION! GET YOUR TICKETS HERE (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) TODAY!

BUILDING OUR NETWORK
Between bites of turkey I made it up to ABATE District 17 (https://www.facebook.com/Abate-of-Iowa-District-17-1936865369714738?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) 's meeting in Charles City. In Congress, I will stand with every Iowan in defense of our Constitutional and God-given liberties and freedoms. I also spent some time on Monday with the dedicated grassroots conservatives in the Kossuth County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Kossuth-County-Republicans-635696166482379/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) as well as stopped by the Mason City Gun Show.

Got a sneak peak of the constituent engagement piece of public service attending a legislative listening session in Forest City with Sen. Dennis Guth, Rep. Terry Baxter, and Rep. Tedd Gassman. Great questions from local residents about education funding, homeopathic medicine, and drainage and learned from the pros about being a responsive representative.

I was also honored to receive the endorsement of several men of integrity who I deeply respect as we continue to build out #TeamBret:
* Alan Moy (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/photos/a.2214079048910309/2462301694088042/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) , Scientific Director and Founder of the John Paul II Institute
* Thomas Shafer (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/photos/a.2214079048910309/2464984290486449/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) , Army veteran and Grundy County GOP co-Chair
* Jim Borcher (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/photos/a.2214079048910309/2464229330561945/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) , Mayor of Irwin
* John O'Brien (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/photos/a.2214079048910309/2466259287025616/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) , 40-year Healthcare Executive
* Dick Lamberty (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/photos/a.2214079048910309/2463099600674918/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) , Army veteran and former Mayor of Lake City

RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/the-iowa-standard-congressional-questionnaire-bret-richards-on-abortion/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489

https://theiowastandard.com/tis-congressional-questionnaire-bret-richards-on-abortion-issue/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489
"A life is a life regardless of the circumstances of how it is created...I don’t know how you distinguish between any life"
UP NEXT

This week I'll be visiting with the next generation of young conservatives at the Wartburg College Republicans meeting and travelling the district from Cerro Gordo and Calhoun counties to Audubon County, Carroll County, and more...

GET INVOLVED

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489

We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=7f40a636b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_22_09_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-7f40a636b3-25822489) we still need your help.

clean_body: I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday with your friends and family. Thousands of jobs in Iowa are tied to agriculture. It's the backbone of our economy. But Congress isn't doing its job to protect Iowa farmers and producers with good policies. Take a look at my proposals here () . Hello I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday () with your friends and family. I took time off the trail this week to eat some great home cooking and spend time with my family (and also to watch Iowa dominate Nebraska () ). On Thursday, many of us probably gave thanks for the blessing of our food-makers, but the thankless and disciplined work of our farmers needs to be top of mind everyday. As Iowans, we see firsthand the benefits our farmers make to our suppers and also our local economies. In Congress, I will oppose burdensome government mandates placed on the backs of our farmers (like WOTUS) and work to expand the reach of our agricultural products to more markets in order to truly realize the economic benefits our farmers produce. When elected to Congress, I am committed to Expanding trade opportunities and increasing global competitiveness Utilizing exports to promote economic growth Combating over-regulation that leads to higher production costs and food prices Maintaining an adequate farming subsidy system and ensuring that federal programs are beneficial while also cost-effective Supporting research to supplement innovations in agriculture I can't fight for the needs of our farmers and agricultural laborers without your support. Please considering donating $5, $15 or even $25 () to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. () You can also support our conservative voice that's desperately needed in Washington attending our ONE-NIGHT-ONLY concert with country singer Trey Taylor. Trey opened rallies for President Trump during his 2016 campaign. I'm grateful for the support and confidence that Trey has placed in our movement and can't wait to hear all the stories he has from the campaign trail. Read on to find out more about his special performance! $25 GENERAL ADMISSION TICKETS HERE () Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you! I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!
